title: Ore Extractor
description: This Data Pack Adds A New Item That Let's You Extract Ores From Blocks By Right Clicking This New Item Selected, When You Extract A Ore You Will Get 10 Piece Of That Ore.
body:
- This Data Pack Adds A New Item That Let's You Extract Ores From Blocks By Right Clicking This New Item Selected, When You Extract A Ore You Will Get 10 Piece Of That Ore.

This Was Simple And Fun To Make Now Injoy Everyone :)

Functions:
ore_extractor:give
